description_long: This stone monument features a relief sculpture of two male figures in classical attire, one holding a laurel wreath aloft while the other bows his head. The figures are carved in high relief on the front face, with the rest of the monument being a solid, rectangular slab. The surface shows signs of weathering and discoloration, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The base is a simple, rectangular plinth with a small plaque or inscription panel at the center. The back of the monument is plain and unadorned, while the sides reveal the depth of the relief carving. The overall appearance is solemn and commemorative, typical of memorials or grave markers found in urban parks or cemeteries.
description: A weathered stone monument with a relief of two classical male figures, one holding a laurel wreath, set on a rectangular base with a small plaque. The front is ornate, while the back and sides are plain and solid.
description_view_0: The front view displays the detailed relief of two male figures, one holding a laurel wreath, and a small plaque at the base.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the depth of the relief carving and the thickness of the monument, with the figures in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a plain, unadorned stone surface with visible weathering and no decorative elements.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the figures and the monument's thickness.
attribute_inscription: There is a small plaque or inscription panel at the center of the base, likely metal, with engraved text. The text is not fully legible in the images.
attribute_ornamentation: The front face features a high-relief carving of two male figures in classical attire, one holding a laurel wreath. No other ornamentation is visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a simple, rectangular plinth made of the same stone as the monument, with a small central plaque. It is solid and slightly wider than the main slab, providing stability.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and slightly curved, with no additional decoration or unique features.
